settings.title: Entity Settings
settings.entityInfoDesc: Update your entity name, logo, description and metadata.
settings.name: Name
settings.adminManagementDesc: Only the Entity Owner can manage admins.
settings.fundManagementDesc: View your entity fund balance and top up when needed.
settings.lifecycleDesc: Manage entity lifecycle: reopen, bind referrer, upgrade type, transfer ownership, or request closure.
settings.bindReferrerDesc: One-time operation, cannot be changed after binding.
settings.transferOwnershipWarning: This operation is irreversible. You will lose Owner permissions after transfer.
settings.transferOwnershipConfirmDesc: This operation is irreversible! You will transfer Entity ownership to {address}. After transfer, you will lose Owner permissions and cannot undo this.
settings.requestCloseWarning: After closing, the Entity will enter PendingClose status and all write operations will be disabled.
settings.requestCloseConfirmDesc: After requesting close, the Entity will enter PendingClose status and all write operations will be disabled. Please confirm to continue.
settings.ownerOnlyAdmins: Only the Entity Owner can manage admins.

help.name: The display name of your entity, visible to all members.
help.logo: Upload a logo image. It will be stored on IPFS.
help.description: A text description of your entity, stored on IPFS.
help.metadataUri: External URI pointing to additional entity metadata (JSON).
help.contact: Contact information stored on IPFS (e.g. email, Telegram).
help.permissions: Select which admin permissions to grant (11-bit bitmask).
help.topUpAmount: Amount of NEX to deposit into entity fund.
help.referrerAddress: Address of the referrer. One-time binding, cannot be changed.
help.newType: The new entity type to upgrade to.
help.newGovernanceMode: New governance mode (None or Full DAO).
help.newOwnerAddress: New owner wallet address. Ownership transfer is irreversible.

shops.title: Shop Management
shops.fundWarning: Insufficient funds, please top up to maintain shop operations

detail.title: Shop Detail
detail.disablePointsDesc: Points system will stop working after disabling.

products.title: Product Management
products.ipfsTextPlaceholder: Enter text, auto-uploads to IPFS on blur

orders.title: Order Management
orders.cleanupDesc: Remove completed/cancelled/refunded order indexes to free capacity
orders.indexNearFull: Shop order index is nearly full, consider cleaning up history
orders.indexFull: Shop order index is full, cannot accept new orders — please cleanup first

help.shopName: A display name for your shop.
help.shopType: The category of your shop (online, physical, service, etc.).
help.initialFund: NEX deposited as operating fund for this shop.
help.topUpAmount: Amount of NEX to add to the shop's operating fund.
help.rewardRate: Points rewarded per purchase as basis points (100 = 1%).
help.exchangeRate: Points-to-token exchange rate as basis points (100 = 1%).
help.allowTransfer: Whether members can transfer points to each other.
help.productDetail: Product detail text, stored on IPFS.
help.usdtPrice: Price in USDT. Set 0 to disable USDT payment.
help.stock: Available stock quantity. Set 0 for unlimited stock.
help.visibility: Who can see this product (Public, Members Only, Level Gated).
help.levelGate: Minimum member level required to purchase this product.
help.maxQuantity: Maximum quantity per order. Set 0 for unlimited.

orders.title: My Orders
orders.placeOrderDesc: Fill in order details and submit
orders.loyaltyDeductionNativeOnly: Points and shopping-balance deductions only work with NEX payments.
orders.validShopId: Please enter a valid shop ID
orders.validProductId: Please enter a valid product ID
orders.validTokenAmount: Please enter a valid points amount
orders.validShoppingBalanceAmount: Please enter a valid shopping balance amount

help.shopId: The numeric ID of the shop to order from.
help.productId: The numeric ID of the product to purchase.
help.paymentMethod: Choose NEX (native token) or Entity Token to pay.
help.referrerAddress: Optional referrer address to earn referral commission.
help.useShoppingBalance: Use your accumulated shopping balance instead of wallet funds.
help.useTokens: Use loyalty points to offset part of the order amount.
help.shoppingBalanceAmount: Enter how much shopping balance to deduct. Decimals are supported.
help.tokenAmount: Enter how many points to use. Decimals are supported.

orders.cleanupDesc: Remove completed/cancelled/refunded order indexes to free capacity
orders.indexNearFull: Order index is nearly full, consider cleaning up history
orders.indexFull: Order index is full, cannot place new orders — please cleanup first

token.title: Token Management
token.noToken: This Entity has not configured a token yet
token.confirmBurnDesc: Token burning is irreversible. Burned tokens cannot be recovered. Please confirm you want to burn the specified amount.
token.transferTokensDesc: Transfer your tokens to another address
token.connectWalletToTransfer: Please connect wallet to use transfer
token.createTokenDesc: Configure and create a token for this Entity
token.rewardRateHelp: Percentage of rewards for token holders (e.g. 5 = 5%)
token.noTokenNoPermission: This Entity has not configured a token yet. Contact the Entity owner to create one.

help.tokenName: Display name of the token (e.g. 'My Token').
help.symbol: Short symbol for the token (e.g. 'TKN'). Max 10 characters.
help.decimals: Number of decimal places (e.g. 12 means 1 token = 10^12 units).
help.type: Token type determines rights: Points, Governance, Equity, etc.
help.maxSupply: Maximum total supply. Set 0 for unlimited.
help.rewardRate: Percentage of rewards for token holders (e.g. 5 = 5%).
help.recipientAddress: Wallet address that will receive the minted tokens.
help.amount: Number of tokens to mint or burn.
help.targetAddress: Wallet address whose tokens will be burned.
help.transferRestrictionMode: Controls who can transfer tokens (None, Whitelist, Blacklist, KYC, Members Only).
help.transferRecipient: Wallet address to send tokens to.
help.totalAmount: Total NEX amount to distribute as dividends.
help.snapshotBlock: Block number to snapshot token holdings for dividend distribution.
help.targetAccount: Wallet address to lock tokens for.
help.lockAmount: Number of tokens to lock in vesting schedule.
help.cliffPeriod: Number of blocks before vesting starts (cliff). No tokens unlock during this period.
help.vestingPeriod: Number of blocks over which tokens gradually unlock after the cliff.

dividend.title: Dividend Management
dividend.confirmDistributeDesc: After distribution, dividends will be allocated to all holders based on their holdings at the snapshot block. This operation is irreversible.

market.title: Entity Market
market.circuitBreakerNotice: Circuit breaker triggered, trading is temporarily suspended. Please wait for the circuit breaker period to end.
market.circuitBreakerActive: Circuit breaker triggered, trading is paused
market.marketTradeNotAvailable: Market trade is not available for NEX market
market.limitBuyDesc: Set price and quantity for a limit buy order
market.limitSellDesc: Set price and quantity for a limit sell order
market.marketBuyDesc: Buy instantly at current market price
market.marketSellDesc: Sell instantly at current market price

help.price: Price per token unit in NEX.
help.quantity: Number of tokens to buy or sell.
help.buyAmount: Number of tokens you want to buy at market price.
help.maxCost: Maximum NEX you're willing to spend (slippage protection).
help.sellAmount: Number of tokens you want to sell at market price.
help.minReceive: Minimum NEX you're willing to receive (slippage protection).
help.usdtPrice: Price in USDT for cross-chain trading.
help.tronAddress: Your TRON wallet address for receiving/sending USDT.
help.minFillAmount: Minimum partial fill amount. Orders below this won't be matched.

firstOrder.bannerEligibleDesc: As a new buyer, your first order deposit is waived. Max amount: {maxAmount} USDT per order, timeout: {timeout} blocks.
firstOrder.bannerActiveDesc: You have an active waived-deposit trade. Complete it before starting another.

members.title: Member Management
members.noShops: Create a shop first to enable this option
members.policyOpenDesc: Anyone can register as a member
members.purchaseRequiredDesc: User must make a purchase to become a member
members.referralRequiredDesc: User must be referred by an existing member
members.approvalRequiredDesc: Admin must manually approve each registration
members.kycUpgradeRequiredDesc: User must complete an upgraded KYC verification
members.pendingMembersDesc: The following members are waiting for approval
members.confirmBanDesc: Are you sure you want to ban member {address}?
members.confirmRemoveDesc: Are you sure you want to remove member {address}? This operation is irreversible.
members.statsPolicyDesc: Configure whether referral counts include repurchase gifts
members.includeRepurchaseDirectDesc: Include direct referrals from repurchase gift relationships in counts
members.includeRepurchaseIndirectDesc: Include indirect referrals from repurchase gift relationships in counts
members.cleanupExpiredDesc: Remove expired pending member records (up to 50)
members.cancelPendingDesc: If you have a pending registration application, you can cancel it here

levels.title: Level System
levels.upgradeTriggerDesc: Configure automatic upgrade conditions for member levels
levels.upgradeModeDesc: Choose how members are upgraded between levels
levels.upgradeRuleSystemDesc: Configure automatic upgrade rules for member levels
levels.resetRuleSystemDesc: This will delete all upgrade rules and cannot be undone
levels.initLevelsFirst: Please initialize the level system first
levels.ruleSystemEnabledDesc: Enable or disable the upgrade rule system
levels.resetLevelSystemDesc: Clear all level configurations. All members must be at base level.

help.registrationPolicy: Rules governing how new members can join this entity.
help.openRegistration: When enabled, anyone can register without conditions.
help.purchaseRequired: Require a purchase before granting membership.
help.referralRequired: Require an existing member referral to register.
help.approvalRequired: Admin must manually approve each registration.
help.kycRequired: Require KYC identity verification to register.
help.selectShop: Choose which shop to associate with when registering.
help.levelName: Display name for this membership level.
help.threshold: Spending threshold in USDT required to reach this level.
help.discountRate: Discount rate this level receives on purchases (percentage).
help.commissionBonus: Additional commission bonus rate for this level (percentage).
help.upgradeMode: How members advance between levels: automatic or manual.
help.triggerType: Event that triggers a level upgrade (purchase, order count, etc.).
help.triggerValue: Numeric value required to trigger the upgrade.
help.targetLevel: The membership level to upgrade to when triggered.
help.duration: How long the upgraded level lasts (in blocks, 0 = permanent).
help.priority: Rule priority. Higher priority rules are evaluated first.
help.stackable: Whether this upgrade rule can stack with others.
help.maxTriggers: Maximum number of times this rule can trigger per member (0 = unlimited).
help.conflictStrategy: How to resolve when multiple upgrade rules match simultaneously.
help.productId: Specific product ID that triggers the upgrade when purchased.

commission.title: Commission Management
commission.overviewDesc: View and manage commission system configuration
commission.globalPausedWarning: Commission system is globally paused by governance
commission.entityStatsDesc: Entity-wide commission totals and pending balances
commission.pluginConfigDesc: Enable or disable commission plugin modules
commission.withdrawalConfigDesc: Configure withdrawal mode, tiers, and parameters
commission.tierSumNote: Withdrawal + Repurchase rates should sum to 10000 bps
commission.withdrawalManagementDesc: Configure withdrawal parameters and control withdrawal status
commission.commissionWithdrawalDesc: Choose NEX or Token channel to withdraw commission
commission.withdrawalPausedNotice: Withdrawal is paused, please contact admin
commission.maintenanceDesc: Order record archiving and maintenance operations

help.baseRate: Base commission rate in basis points (10000 = 100%).
help.newRate: New commission rate to set (basis points).
help.creatorRewardRate: Rate rewarded to entity creator from commissions (bps).
help.tokenWithdrawalCooldown: Minimum blocks between token commission withdrawals.
help.withdrawalMode: How commission is withdrawn: full, fixed rate, level-based, or member choice.
help.withdrawalRate: Percentage of commission that can be withdrawn (bps).
help.repurchaseRate: Percentage of commission that goes to repurchase (bps).
help.voluntaryBonusRate: Extra bonus for members who choose higher repurchase rate (bps).
help.fixedRepurchaseRate: Fixed repurchase percentage applied to all withdrawals (bps).
help.minRepurchaseRate: Minimum repurchase rate members must maintain (bps).
help.minWithdrawal: Minimum commission amount required to withdraw.
help.cooldownPeriod: Number of blocks to wait between withdrawals.
help.requestedRepurchaseRate: Your chosen repurchase rate (bps). Must meet minimum requirements.
help.repurchaseTarget: Optional account address to receive repurchase tokens.

multiLevel.title: Multi-Level Commission Config
multiLevel.initConfigDesc: Set up multi-level commission by configuring the max total rate and at least one tier.
multiLevel.noConfig: Multi-level commission is not configured yet.
multiLevel.initTiersHint: Add at least one tier. L0 = direct referrer, L1 = referrer's referrer, etc.
multiLevel.maxDepthDesc: Maximum referral depth for commission distribution
multiLevel.levelRatesTableDesc: View and edit commission rates for each level
multiLevel.memberPreviewDesc: Your position in the multi-level network

help.maxTotalRate: Maximum total multi-level commission rate across all tiers (bps).
help.tierIndex: The tier position in the multi-level hierarchy.
help.newTierRate: Commission rate for this tier in basis points.
help.requiredDirects: Minimum number of direct referrals required to qualify for this tier (0 = no requirement).
help.requiredTeamSize: Minimum team size required to qualify for this tier (0 = no requirement).
help.requiredSpent: Minimum cumulative USDT spend required to qualify for this tier (0 = no requirement).
help.requiredLevelId: Member level required for the referrer to earn this tier's commission (0 or 'Any Level' = no requirement).

referral.title: Referral Commission Config
referral.maxRewardPerOrderDesc: Maximum referral reward per single order
referral.minOrderAmountDesc: Minimum order amount to trigger referral reward
referral.fixedAmountConfigDesc: Set a fixed reward amount per referral
referral.referrerGuardConfigDesc: Set minimum requirements for referrers to earn commission
referral.commissionCapConfigDesc: Set maximum commission caps per order and total
referral.referralValidityConfigDesc: Set validity period and order limits for referral relationships

help.rewardRate: Referral commission rate in basis points (10000 = 100%).
help.maxRewardPerOrder: Maximum referral reward amount per single order.
help.minOrderAmount: Minimum order amount required to trigger referral reward.
help.fixedAmount: Fixed reward amount given per referral regardless of order size.
help.firstOrderAmount: Fixed reward amount for the first order from a referred user.
help.firstOrderRate: Commission rate for first orders from referred users (bps).
help.repeatRate: Commission rate for repeat purchases from referred users (bps).
help.minOrders: Minimum number of orders before repeat purchase rewards activate.
help.minReferrerSpent: Minimum total spending required for a referrer to earn commission.
help.minReferrerOrders: Minimum order count required for a referrer to earn commission.
help.maxPerOrder: Maximum commission amount earnable per single order.
help.maxTotalEarned: Maximum total commission a referrer can earn.
help.validityBlocks: Number of blocks the referral relationship remains active.
help.validOrders: Number of orders the referral relationship is valid for.

levelDiff.title: Level Diff Commission Config
levelDiff.tiersSectionDesc: Configure commission rates for each member level
levelDiff.maxDepthDesc: Maximum depth for level diff commission
levelDiff.runtimeDerivedOnly: Runtime no longer exposes dedicated stats; this page only shows live configuration.

help.levelRates: Commission rates for each level, comma-separated in basis points.
help.maxDepth: Maximum depth for level differential commission distribution.

singleLine.title: Single Line Commission Config
singleLine.thresholdZeroHint: Set to 0 to disable dynamic growth
singleLine.levelModeDesc: Choose how commission levels are determined: fixed by member level, or dynamically grown by cumulative earnings.
singleLine.modeMemberLevelDesc: Levels are determined by member level overrides or the base levels, with no dynamic growth.
singleLine.modeThresholdDesc: Levels grow dynamically as cumulative earnings reach each threshold increment.
singleLine.myPositionDesc: Your position in the single line network
singleLine.levelOverridesSectionDesc: Configure different upline/downline layers per member level
singleLine.noOverrides: No level overrides configured. All levels use the base layer count.
singleLine.levelOverrideHint: Level ID must match an existing custom level in the member system
singleLine.noLevelsConfigured: No custom member levels configured. Please create levels in member management first.
singleLine.runtimeDerivedOnly: Runtime no longer exposes single-line stats or position storage; this page only shows configuration.

help.uplineRate: Commission rate paid to upline members (bps).
help.downlineRate: Commission rate paid to downline members (bps).
help.baseUplineLevels: Default number of upline levels that receive commission.
help.baseDownlineLevels: Default number of downline levels that receive commission.
help.levelIncrementThreshold: Spending threshold to unlock additional commission levels. Set to 0 to disable dynamic growth — levels will be determined solely by member level overrides or the base levels.
help.maxUplineLevels: Maximum number of upline levels that can receive commission.
help.maxDownlineLevels: Maximum number of downline levels that can receive commission.
help.levelId: Member level ID to apply the override to.
help.overrideUplineLevels: Custom number of upline levels for this member level.
help.overrideDownlineLevels: Custom number of downline levels for this member level.

exceedsMaxGuide.title: Level override exceeds maximum allowed levels
exceedsMaxGuide.desc: The upline/downline layers you entered exceed the maximum levels configured in the base configuration above.
exceedsMaxGuide.step1: Go to the Configuration section above and increase "Max Upline Levels" or "Max Downline Levels" to the desired value.
exceedsMaxGuide.step2: Click "Save Configuration" and wait for the transaction to finalize.
exceedsMaxGuide.step3: Come back here and set the level override again — now it will be within the allowed range.

team.title: Team Commission Config
team.tiersSectionDesc: Configure commission tiers based on team performance
team.runtimeDerivedOnly: Runtime no longer exposes team stats/details storage; this page only shows configuration.

help.settlementPeriod: Settlement cycle length in blocks for team commission calculation.
help.minTeamSize: Minimum team member count required to qualify for commission.
help.maxDepth: Maximum depth of team hierarchy for commission calculation.
help.allowStacking: Whether team commission can stack with other commission types.
help.thresholdMode: How the performance threshold is calculated: personal only, team total, or weighted mix.
help.newTierRate: Commission rate for this team tier (bps).
help.newTierMinPerformance: Minimum team sales performance to qualify for this tier.
help.newTierMinDirect: Minimum number of direct referrals to qualify for this tier.

poolReward.title: Pool Reward Config
poolReward.poolRateDesc: Percentage of commission allocated to the pool (bps)
poolReward.distributionModeDesc: How the pool rewards are distributed
poolReward.noLevelsConfigured: No custom member levels configured. Please create levels in member management first.
poolReward.roundDurationDesc: Duration of each round in blocks
poolReward.currentRoundInfoDesc: Information about the current pool reward round
poolReward.levelSnapshotsDesc: Per-level reward amount and claim progress for current round
poolReward.claimHistoryDesc: Your past claim records for this entity
poolReward.fillFormFirst: Please fill in level ratios and round duration below, then click Save Configuration to enable.
poolReward.errorNoLevelRatios: Please add at least one level ratio before saving.
poolReward.errorNoRoundDuration: Please enter a round duration (in blocks) before saving.
poolReward.errorRatioSumMismatch: Level ratios must sum to 10000 bps (100%). Current total: {current} bps.

help.levelRatios: Comma-separated level:ratio pairs defining reward share per level (e.g. 1:500, 2:300).
help.roundDuration: Duration of each pool reward round in blocks.

governance.noGovernance: This entity has not enabled DAO governance
governance.noGovernanceDesc: DAO governance is not enabled for this entity

help.proposalCategory: Select the area this proposal affects.
help.proposalType: The specific governance action to propose.
help.proposalTitle: A brief title describing the proposal.
help.proposalDescription: Detailed description of what the proposal intends to accomplish.

disclosure.title: Financial Disclosure & Announcements
disclosure.blackoutActiveDesc: Currently in blackout period (Block {start} ~ {end}, current block {current}), insider trading is prohibited.

help.contentCid: IPFS CID pointing to the full disclosure content.
help.summaryCid: IPFS CID for a short summary (optional).
help.disclosureType: Category of the disclosure (financial, operational, etc.).
help.announcementTitle: Title of the announcement to publish.
help.expiresAtBlock: Block number after which the announcement expires (optional).

kyc.title: KYC Verification Management
kyc.submitApplicationDesc: Select certification level and upload KYC data
kyc.onlyCompletedOrders: Only completed orders can be reviewed
kyc.kycManagementDesc: Review and manage user KYC certification records

help.minLevel: Minimum KYC level required for entity members.
help.maxRiskScore: Maximum risk score allowed (0-100). Members above this are rejected.
help.gracePeriod: Grace period in blocks before KYC expiry takes effect.
help.mandatory: Whether KYC verification is mandatory for all members.
help.certificationLevel: KYC certification level to apply for.
help.dataCid: IPFS CID of your KYC documents.
help.newDataCid: Updated IPFS CID for KYC data.

help.roundName: Display name for the sale round.
help.totalSupply: Total tokens available for sale in this round.
help.price: Token price per unit in NEX.
help.startBlock: Block number when the sale round begins.
help.endBlock: Block number when the sale round ends.
help.minPurchase: Minimum tokens a buyer must purchase per order.
help.maxPurchase: Maximum tokens a buyer can purchase in total.
help.softCap: Minimum raise target. Below this, buyers can claim refund.
help.hardCap: Maximum raise target. Sale ends when reached.
help.decayBlocks: Number of blocks over which price decays from start to end.
help.cliffPeriod: Blocks before purchased tokens start vesting.
help.vestingPeriod: Blocks over which purchased tokens gradually unlock.
help.initialUnlockBps: Percentage of tokens unlocked immediately at TGE (bps).
help.unlockInterval: Interval between each unlock step in blocks.

reviews.title: Review Management
reviews.onlyCompletedOrders: Only completed orders can be reviewed

help.orderId: ID of the completed order to review.
